pathAssistantSteps.info:
Prerequisites:

  • Create Asset: The asset must be created first enabling users to create assemblies for the asset.


Steps for Assembly Creation:

  • Enter the technical information for the assembly. CAUTION: Utilization values (TSN, CSN, TSO, CSO and etc.) should be for the moment from which utilization will start it’s reporting and MRs will be collected.

Prerequisites:

  • Maintenance Program DB: Database should be created before new Asset entered into the system and associated with created asset to allow Assemblies inherit Maintenance Program defined Maintenance Events.

Historical Events Creation:

  • Create Historical Event records for every Assembly to let the system calculate next due of every event
